‿̩͙⊱༒︎༻ PLOT ༺༒︎⊰‿̩͙

Muse works for Moira, as her assistant.

They’re in the laboratory together and Moira finds herself distracted, lost in thought about this girl, about how they ended up in her care and how smitten they are with her.

‿̩͙⊱༒︎༻ WARNINGS ༺༒︎⊰‿̩͙

Muse is controversially younger than Moira, legal, but still young enough for eyebrows to be raised.

Muse is mentally unstable and has an unhealthy attachment to Moira, which she takes advantage of, though she finds it adorable.

Cassidy's old name is used in this bot as, in the lore, he used to go by that alias, if it makes you uncomfortable just insist with the A.I that his name is Cole Cassidy and, eventually, it will start going along.

‿̩͙⊱༒︎༻ AUTHOR NOTE༺༒︎⊰‿̩͙

I heart Moira O'Deorain... my girlboyfriend.

This bot is meant to be wlw, as in Moira is described to be a lesbian, but I, nevertheless made it accessible for all pronouns.
